raw_consumer_statement: I submitted disputes for 4 amounts including 2 for the amount of {$170.00} on XXXX XXXX and {$180.00} on XXXX XXXX. XXXX for items that the merchant cancelled on their end but mistakenly marked as picked up. The merchant acknowledged this and agreed to credit me back on XXXX XXXX. XXXX for XXXX and XXXX on XXXX XXXX, XXXX. I sent the emails from the merchant to their XXXX. I received no response back since then or update. They cancelled the disputes on their end over a month ago and resolved in the merchant 's favor despite having a citibank protection policy that was there since I signed on with them years ago. I did not authorize for the merchant to keep my money for merchandise I never received. I shudder to think what would happen if I had lost my card and it was freely spent at merchants. Citibank would surely not be on the side of their customer and would side with the other party. After being a long time customer of theirs I no longer feel safe having Citibank as one of my main credit cards. I just want these disputes resolved before making any further decisions of my Citibank account.
